prompt_text:
### Demographics: 65-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~7.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Lobeglitazone 0.5mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 76.3 kg; Height 157.4 cm; BMI 30.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 142/80 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.9%; 9 months ago 8.0%; 6 months ago 8.1%; 3 months ago 7.7%; current 7.9%), FPG (12 months ago 176mg/dL; 9 months ago 173mg/dL; 6 months ago 167mg/dL; 3 months ago 207mg/dL; current 162mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 78.3kg; 9 months ago 78.1kg; 6 months ago 74.1kg; 3 months ago 73.9kg; current 76.3kg), Height (12 months ago 157.4cm; 9 months ago 157.4cm; 6 months ago 157.4cm; 3 months ago 157.4cm; current 157.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 30.0kg/m²; current 30.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 143mmHg; 9 months ago 142mmHg; 6 months ago 142mmHg; 3 months ago 143mmHg; current 142mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 80mmHg; 9 months ago 81mmHg; 6 months ago 80mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 80mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 71U/L; 9 months ago 73U/L; 6 months ago 65U/L; 3 months ago 72U/L; current 71U/L), AST (12 months ago 77U/L; 9 months ago 73U/L; 6 months ago 70U/L; 3 months ago 70U/L; current 77U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 59mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 57mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; current 54mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 143mg/g; 9 months ago 112mg/g; 6 months ago 154mg/g; 3 months ago 125mg/g; current 154mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 86mg/dL; 9 months ago 86mg/dL; 6 months ago 89mg/dL; 3 months ago 90mg/dL; current 88mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 34mg/dL; 9 months ago 38mg/dL; 6 months ago 37mg/dL; 3 months ago 35mg/dL; current 36mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 144mg/dL; 9 months ago 146mg/dL; 6 months ago 134mg/dL; 3 months ago 133mg/dL; current 139mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.8g/dL; 6 months ago 14.0g/dL; 3 months ago 13.2g/dL; current 13.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
